title: Talkdroid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Talkdroid''' was another name for [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]], used primarily by [[Alien/Legends|alien]] species from less developed [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
*[[Return of the Jedi 1|''Return of the Jedi'' 1]] {{Reprint|Return of the Jedi 1}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1984-12-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
